blogPreview.heading: Writeups / Blog
blogPreview.intro: Technical writeups covering CTF solves, lab work, exploitation paths, and security lessons pulled from hands-on practice.

items.title: Web Exploitation Workflow
items.text: A practical workflow for approaching web targets in labs and CTFs, from surface mapping and logic flaws to clean exploit validation.

items.title: Active Directory Lab Notes
items.text: Notes from building and attacking an Active Directory lab, with emphasis on enumeration, trust relationships, and privilege escalation paths.

items.title: My First CTF
items.text: A short walkthrough of my first rooted CTF target, from initial enumeration to privilege escalation and the habits that made the path clear.
